description: Refactor deck builder rendering from static HTML strings to server-rendered pages with media proxy. Each slide is a mini website with full web capabilities. S3 videos use /api/media/s3?key=... proxy for permanent URLs.

userStories.title: S3 media proxy endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a proxy endpoint that serves S3 media with fresh signed URLs so that slides can reference media with permanent, non-expiring URLs.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/api/media/s3/route.ts (already exists as skeleton — verify and complete)
GET /api/media/s3?key=video_capture/completed/.../file.MP4 returns 302 redirect to freshly signed S3 URL
Uses getS3SignedUrl from src/lib/s3/presigner.ts with 1-hour expiry
Response includes Cache-Control: private, max-age=3000
Returns 400 if key param missing
Rejects keys containing '..' or starting with '/' (path traversal protection)
Works for video (mp4, webm, mov) and image (jpg, png, webp) files
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Read src/lib/s3/presigner.ts for getS3SignedUrl. Read src/app/api/media/s3/route.ts if it exists. This is the foundation — all other stories depend on the proxy URL pattern /api/media/s3?key=KEY.

userStories.title: S3 URL rewriting utility
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a utility function that rewrites S3 references in HTML to use the media proxy, so that both server routes and editor preview can normalize URLs.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/deck-builder/rewrite-s3-urls.ts
Export rewriteS3ToProxy(html: string): string
Rewrites s3-placeholder.local/* URLs to /api/media/s3?key=...
Rewrites moonvalley-annotation-platform.s3.*.amazonaws.com/KEY?... URLs to /api/media/s3?key=KEY (extracts key before first ?)
Rewrites double-signed S3 URLs (two ?X-Amz blocks) correctly by extracting the key
Rewrites {{s3:key}} template tokens to /api/media/s3?key=...
Already-proxied URLs (/api/media/s3?key=...) are left unchanged
Non-S3 URLs (https://cdn.jsdelivr.net, data:, blob:) are left unchanged
Function is synchronous (no async, no signing — just URL rewriting)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: This replaces the fragile sign-slide-urls.ts. Key difference: this does NOT sign URLs — it rewrites them to the proxy pattern. The proxy handles signing at request time. Must handle all the broken URL formats we've seen in existing slides.

userStories.title: Server-rendered single slide route
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a route that serves a single slide as a full HTML page so that present mode and QA screenshots get server-rendered slides.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/api/slide/[templateId]/[slideIndex]/route.ts
GET /api/slide/[templateId]/[slideIndex] returns complete HTML page for that slide
Fetches template from Supabase using createSupabaseAdminClient, extracts slide by sorted order index
If slide has html field, uses that as content. Otherwise generates from layout system (renderSlideLayout + getBackgroundCSS)
Applies theme colors and fonts from template.theme and template.custom_theme
Runs rewriteS3ToProxy on the slide HTML before serving
Sets <base href> to request origin so /api/media/s3?key=... resolves correctly
HTML page has: CSS reset, theme styles, slide-root container at 100% width/height
Returns Content-Type: text/html with Cache-Control: private, no-cache
Returns 404 if template or slide not found, 400 if invalid index
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Read src/lib/deck-builder/html-renderer.ts layoutToHtml function for how slides are wrapped with background + grid + glow. Read slide-themes.ts getTheme. Read slide-layouts.ts renderSlideLayout. No auth required on this route.

userStories.title: Presentation controller route
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a route that serves the full presentation with all slides and navigation so that present mode uses a server-rendered page.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/api/slide/[templateId]/present/route.ts
GET /api/slide/[templateId]/present returns full navigable presentation HTML
Fetches all slides from template, sorts by order
Each slide HTML has S3 references resolved via rewriteS3ToProxy
Uses 1920x1080 fixed stage with slide-scaler div (same as current html-renderer.ts)
JS: fitStage scales to fit viewport, keyboard nav (arrows, space, home, end), touch/swipe nav, overview mode (Escape), progress bar, slide counter
PostMessage API works: goToSlide, enableSelector, disableSelector
All CSS and JS inline — self-contained HTML page
Sets <base href> for proxy URL resolution
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Port the presentation logic from renderSlidesToHTML in html-renderer.ts. The JS navigation code (~200 lines) can be copied almost verbatim. Key difference: S3 URLs are rewritten to proxy format, not baked-in signed URLs. Do NOT delete renderSlidesToHTML — it's still used for export.

userStories.title: Update present mode to use server route
userStories.description: As a user, I want the present button to open a server-rendered presentation so that videos play and media loads reliably.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify handlePresent in DeckEditorClient.tsx
Instead of building blob URL, open window to /api/slide/{templateId}/present
Remove renderSlidesToHTML call, blob creation, URL.createObjectURL, and revokeObjectURL from handlePresent
Remove the sign-urls fetch that was added previously
Must save slides to Supabase BEFORE opening present (so server route has latest data)
Add auto-save: if unsaved changes exist, save first then open present
Navigation works: arrow keys, space, swipe
Progress bar updates correctly
Videos autoplay on slides with video content
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Read DeckEditorClient.tsx handlePresent (around line 261). The save function is handleSave — call it before opening. Template ID is available as template.id. Port 3005 for dev testing.

userStories.title: Update editor preview to use media proxy URLs
userStories.description: As a user, I want videos and images to preview correctly in the editor so that I can see media while editing slides.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify PresentationPreview.tsx
Before passing HTML to setSrcdoc, run rewriteS3ToProxy on the generated HTML
Import rewriteS3ToProxy from src/lib/deck-builder/rewrite-s3-urls.ts
Also run rewriteS3ToProxy on individual slide HTML in the renderSlidesToHTML call
Videos play in the editor preview iframe
Images from S3 display in the editor preview iframe
Editor preview still uses srcdoc (no change to debounce or instant-feedback behavior)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Read PresentationPreview.tsx — the srcdoc is set in a debounced useEffect. Run rewriteS3ToProxy on the html string before setSrcdoc(html). Also check html-renderer.ts renderSlidesToHTML — may need to run rewrite there too.

userStories.title: Update agent prompts for proxy URLs
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the design agent and orchestrator prompts to reference proxy URLs so generated slides work immediately.
acceptanceCriteria: Update design-prompt.ts: CANVAS description says slides are 1920x1080px served as web pages
Add to design-prompt.ts: 'For S3 media use /api/media/s3?key=PATH. Example: <video src="/api/media/s3?key=video_capture/completed/.../file.MP4" autoplay muted loop playsinline>'
Add to design-prompt.ts: 'You can load external scripts from CDN: <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/gsap@3.12.5/dist/gsap.min.js"></script>'
Add to design-prompt.ts: 'Google Fonts: <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=..." rel="stylesheet">'
Update gtm-prompts.ts: set_slide_html description mentions proxy URLs and 1920x1080 fixed canvas
Update ai-tools.ts: set_slide_html tool description mentions proxy URLs
Remove signSlideHtml import and calls from chat/route.ts (no longer needed — proxy handles it)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Read design-prompt.ts, gtm-prompts.ts, ai-tools.ts for current wording. Some of these were already partially updated in the orchestration improvements session — check current state before editing. Remove import of signSlideHtml from chat/route.ts.

userStories.title: Update research agent to return proxy URLs
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the research agent's get_dataset_samples tool to return proxy URLs instead of signed URLs so they don't expire.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify get_dataset_samples handler in executor.ts
Instead of calling getS3SignedUrl, return /api/media/s3?key={s3_object_key} as the URL
Remove import of getS3SignedUrl from executor.ts (if no other usage remains)
Embed hint updated: <video src="/api/media/s3?key=..." autoplay muted loop playsinline>
Returned URLs never expire (they're proxy URLs, not signed)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Read executor.ts get_dataset_samples handler (around line 306). Currently calls getS3SignedUrl for each sample. Replace with simple string concatenation to proxy URL format.

userStories.title: Update QA screenshot capture to use server route
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the auto-verify system to screenshot server-rendered slides so QA sees what users will see.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify autoVerifySlide in server-tool-handlers.ts
Navigate Playwright to /api/slide/[templateId]/[slideIndex] instead of building HTML and loading via srcdoc/page.setContent
Must save updated slides_json to Supabase BEFORE taking screenshot (server route reads from DB)
Add templateId parameter to autoVerifySlide function signature
Update all callers of autoVerifySlide in chat/route.ts to pass templateId
Screenshot matches what present mode shows
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Read autoVerifySlide in server-tool-handlers.ts. Currently it builds HTML and uses Playwright to render. Change to: save slides to DB, then navigate Playwright to the server route URL. The save step is critical — the server route reads from Supabase.

userStories.title: Migrate existing slide HTML to proxy URLs
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a migration script that rewrites S3 URLs in existing slide HTML to use proxy URLs.
acceptanceCriteria: Create scripts/migrate-slide-urls.ts
Script reads all slide_templates with slides_json from Supabase
For each slide with an html field, runs rewriteS3ToProxy to rewrite S3 references
Handles: s3-placeholder.local URLs, signed S3 bucket URLs, double-signed URLs, {{s3:key}} tokens
Script is idempotent — running twice produces same result (already-proxied URLs unchanged)
Script logs: templates processed, slides updated, URLs rewritten count
Saves updated slides_json back to Supabase
Run on demo deck template 54f7930f-cf81-4c0d-8f66-28ddaf93476a
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Import rewriteS3ToProxy from rewrite-s3-urls.ts. Use createSupabaseAdminClient. Load dotenv from .env.local. Run with npx tsx scripts/migrate-slide-urls.ts.

userStories.title: Add media_refs field to SlideData
userStories.description: As a developer, I need each slide to track which S3 media keys it references for dependency tracking and cache pre-warming.
acceptanceCriteria: Add optional media_refs field to SlideData type in src/types/deck-builder.ts: media_refs?: string[]
Create extractMediaRefs(html: string): string[] utility in src/lib/deck-builder/rewrite-s3-urls.ts
Extraction: parse /api/media/s3?key=KEY patterns from HTML, collect unique keys
After delegate_design applies HTML in chat/route.ts, extract media_refs and set on slide data
After set_slide_html in ai-tools.ts, extract media_refs and set on slide data
media_refs saved as part of slides_json (no Supabase schema change)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Read src/types/deck-builder.ts for SlideData interface. The extraction function should use a simple regex on /api/media/s3?key= pattern. Dedup with Set.

userStories.title: Clean up legacy signing code
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to remove the fragile URL signing code that's no longer needed.
acceptanceCriteria: Delete src/lib/deck-builder/sign-slide-urls.ts
Delete src/app/api/admin/deck-builder/[id]/sign-urls/route.ts and its directory
Remove signSlideHtml and refreshS3Urls imports from any file that still references them
Remove sign-urls fetch from DeckEditorClient.tsx handlePresent (if not already done in US-005)
Keep src/lib/s3/presigner.ts (still used by media proxy and data catalog)
Keep src/app/api/media/s3/route.ts (this is the new approach)
Typecheck passes
npm run build succeeds
userStories.notes: Run grep for sign-slide-urls, signSlideHtml, refreshS3Urls, sign-urls across the codebase to find all references. Remove them all. This is cleanup — no new functionality.

userStories.title: Playwright E2E test — video playback in present mode
userStories.description: As QA, I need an end-to-end test verifying that videos play in presentation mode.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/e2e/deck-video-playback.spec.ts
Log in as admin (team@claru.ai / qweqwe123!)
Navigate to deck builder with template 54f7930f-cf81-4c0d-8f66-28ddaf93476a
Click present button
Switch to new tab (presentation)
Navigate to slide 6 (5 arrow-right presses)
Wait for video elements to reach readyState >= 2 (data loaded) with 30s timeout
Assert no video elements have networkState === 3 (error)
Assert at least one video is not paused (autoplay working)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Dev server at http://localhost:3005. Use Playwright test patterns from tests/e2e/deck-builder-crud.spec.ts for login helper.

userStories.title: Playwright E2E test — editor preview media
userStories.description: As QA, I need an end-to-end test verifying that media displays in the editor preview.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/e2e/deck-editor-media.spec.ts
Log in as admin
Navigate to deck builder with the demo template
Click on slide 6 thumbnail
In the main preview iframe, find video elements
Assert video src or source elements contain /api/media/s3?key= URLs
Assert video networkState !== 3 (no error loading)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: The editor preview uses srcdoc iframe. Need to access iframe content via Playwright frame locator. Use same login pattern as other E2E tests.
